summary: Verified Play Again AI regeneration fix for TeacherHubPro Educational Games. All tests PASSED: The AI no longer generates TODO/FIXME/PLACEHOLDER tokens, and 3 consecutive Play Again attempts all generate COMPLETELY DIFFERENT questions.

success_rate.backend: 100% - 13/13 tests passed (6 banned tokens tests + 7 regeneration tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Playwright verified Play Again generates different questions

context_for_next_testing_agent: Play Again AI regeneration is fully working. Key fixes verified: 1) Enhanced system prompt with BANNED CONTENT section (lines 113-123 in games.py), 2) Pre-validation check for banned tokens before JSON parsing (lines 422-429), 3) MAX_GENERATION_ATTEMPTS increased to 5 (line 27), 4) Frontend shows warning when regeneration fails (lines 383-386 in PlayGame.js).
